headline.text: L1 put *125,440 pieces* on hold for defective label backing, L3 held one display pallet for missing lot box, plus a live water leak at L3 ML1 since 06:48.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 S2 cleared a labeler jam quickly at 09:09 but discovered defective label backing throughout the shift — 83 rolls holding 125,440 pieces were pulled by 23:02. S3 ran pretzel through the night but exceeded doubles spec at 37.58% by window close. A missing nut near MM4 paused the line at 17:01 for investigation; determined to be a spare from earlier maintenance, cleared by 17:12.
per_plant_summary.L2: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 has a water pipe leak since 06:48, maintenance working with no ETA. ML4 cleared a sticker applicator jam at 09:04 but it went down again at 13:36 and remained problematic through shift change. A pallet of V2 display boxes was held at 14:58 for missing lot identification; enough inventory remains to complete the order. TG5 conveyor belt tore during post-clean startup at 06:09, cause identified as edge damage but repair status unclear.

resolved.title: S3 high temper reading at startup
resolved.summary: Line could not start due to high temper; enrober return pump had been left in manual mode, draining the sump.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:13 — pump corrected, temper normalized, line started.

resolved.title: S3 missing nut found near MM4
resolved.summary: Nut found on MM4 top cover during production, line paused to investigate source and inspect for missing hardware.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 17:12 — determined to be spare nut brought by 1st shift maintenance for earlier C21 repair, not a missing part from equipment.

resolved.title: S2 jar labeling machine buildup
resolved.summary: Labeling machine experienced significant product buildup, paused for mechanical adjustment.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:09 — Troy configured capper within centerlines, labeler working well.

resolved.title: S3 Matrix air pressure alarm at restart
resolved.summary: All three Matrix machines showed air pressure alarm after lunch rotation; x-ray belts also required login.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 19:25 — Caleb York assisted, compressor at 115 psi, operator restarted Matrixes successfully.

resolved.title: S2 CW1 belt skipping and clattering
resolved.summary: Belt on CW1 in jar area appeared broken; team routed jars around it until inspection.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 01:50 — belt was out of track with excess slack, not broken; Jordan re-ran belt at 05:22 to remove slack.

resolved.title: Cavanna jaws outputting doubles
resolved.summary: Cavanna jaws began outputting doubles at 09:50; Nathan Ruiz shimmed all three blades and leveled the head.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:25 — Nathan shimmed blades, tightened outfeed belt, leveled head; no more doubles or sealing issues observed.

resolved.title: Sweco screen north side broken
resolved.summary: Sweco screen on north side broke during overnight cleaning; team replaced with new screen.
resolved.resolution: Replaced and ATP passed at 04:27 — "ATP passed" (Luisiana Castro).

resolved.title: Chocolate jammed on conveyor to TG3
resolved.summary: Line ran 10 minutes at 19 mpm before chocolate jammed on the TG3 infeed conveyor.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:43 — team reduced speed back to 18 mpm, line resumed.

resolved.title: Depositor #4 sensors chocolate buildup
resolved.summary: Sensors on depositor #4 accumulated chocolate buildup; white chocolate side agitator also had hard buildup.

needs_attention.title: S2 defective label backing, 83 rolls on hold
needs_attention.summary: Label backing plastic tears easily, causing labeler to jam; QA identified 5 rolls by 12:34, escalated to 83 rolls (125,440 pcs) on hold by 23:02.
needs_attention.status: First 5 rolls flagged at 12:34; pallet of 83 rolls placed on hold by 22:16, confirmed in schedule chat at 23:02.

needs_attention.title: S3 doubles exceeding 10% spec
needs_attention.summary: MM3 measured 37.58% doubles at 00:34, well over the 10% maximum specification.
needs_attention.status: Victor flagged at 00:34 that doubles hit 37.58%, asked Luis and Ebrima to separate pretzels further; no follow-up by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 water pipe leak, glycol shut off
needs_attention.summary: Water pipe leak detected at 06:48, maintenance shut off glycol and began work.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on leak as of 07:07, no ETA provided by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 sticker applicator recurring failures
needs_attention.summary: Sticker applicator jammed at 07:54, Nathan Ruiz cleared; went down again at 13:36 causing heavy accumulation, issues persisted into 2nd shift.
needs_attention.status: Cleared once at 09:04; failed again at 13:36 with 10-minute pause to clear accumulation; Tyson reported ongoing sticker issues at 15:58.

needs_attention.title: ML4 bottom of bar bubbles consistently
needs_attention.summary: Approximately 2 pieces per mold showing bottom-of-bar bubbles; operators working to reduce defect rate.
needs_attention.status: Bubbles first noted at 08:05; Preston asked team to improve at 08:52; updates at 10:55 and 11:28 show defect persisting, adjustments ongoing through 15:54.

needs_attention.title: ML4 display box V2 pallet on hold, missing lot
needs_attention.summary: One pallet of V2 display boxes missing lot identification box, placed on hold; switched to V3 caddies.
needs_attention.status: Pallet held at 14:58; Andrea confirmed at 17:55 enough V3 displays to complete order, V2 separated by 16:20.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG4 silver lining defects
needs_attention.summary: Silver lining issues on TG4, operator and maintenance tried multiple rolls without resolution.
needs_attention.status: Operator and maintenance working on TG4 silver lining at 16:30, tried multiple rolls, no resolution by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG5 conveyor belt damaged post-clean
needs_attention.summary: TG5 conveyor belt tore after level 2 clean completed and belts ran; maintenance investigating cause.
needs_attention.status: Belt damaged at 06:09; Frederick reported at 06:44 maintenance found 3 initial tears, believes edge in that section caused it; repair status unclear.

needs_attention.title: ML1 HMI alarm overnight
needs_attention.summary: HMI alarm posted at 18:44 on 30th, no context or resolution provided.
needs_attention.status: Alarm reported at 18:44, Nathan Gevenois acknowledged, no follow-up by window close.
